fx_tone_mapping.label: Tone Mapping
fx_tone_mapping.description: Controls how HDR values are mapped to the display

fx_brightness_contrast.label: Brightness / Contrast
fx_brightness_contrast.description: Adjusts overall image brightness and contrast

fx_hue_saturation.label: Hue / Saturation
fx_hue_saturation.description: Shifts hue and scales color saturation

fx_bloom.label: Bloom
fx_bloom.description: Glowing highlights bleed from bright areas

fx_depth_of_field.label: Depth of Field
fx_depth_of_field.description: Bokeh blur outside the focal plane

fx_chromatic_aberration.label: Chromatic Aberration
fx_chromatic_aberration.description: RGB channel fringing along edges, like a real lens

fx_ascii.label: ASCII
fx_ascii.description: Renders the scene as ASCII characters

vmc_receiver.label: VMC Receiver
vmc_receiver.description: Receives motion capture data from RhyLive or any VMC-compatible app over UDP.

breathing.label: Breathing
breathing.description: Adds procedural breathing motion to the chest and spine bones using a sine oscillator.

lipsync_processor.label: Lipsync
lipsync_processor.description: Receives microphone viseme weights from the browser and drives VRM blendshapes in real time.

mediapipe_tracker.label: MediaPipe Tracking
mediapipe_tracker.description: Receives face, hand, and body pose landmarks from the browser camera and drives VRM bones and blendshapes in real time.

api_controller.label: API Controller
api_controller.description: Drives the avatar via REST: set/queue animations and blendshape expressions.
